holdings.infoBox: DIVO is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 6.26%, American Express Company at 5.42%, Apple at 5.33%, Microsoft at 5.26%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 5.18%.

overview.description: The Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income ETF (DIVO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides income by selecting stocks from the S&P 500 Index overlaid with a tactical call writing strategy. DIVO was launched on Dec 14, 2016 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Amplify ETFs CEO on ETFs with income-focused strategies
data.text: Christian Magoon, Amplify ETFs CEO and founder, joins CNBC's Dominic Chu on 'Halftime Report' to discuss the firm's ETF suite which includes dividend and income-focused strategies via options.

data.title: DIVO: Is this JEPI ETF alternative a good dividend fund?
data.text: The Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income ETF (DIVO) fund has done well, rising to its highest point on record. It rallied to a high of $41.80, meaning that it has jumped by 13.5% this year.
